name: Lemon-Pineapple Baked Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the pineapple and combine the juice with garlic, cornstarch, Worcestershire sauce, mustard, and dried rosemary. Set aside.
2. Arrange chicken in a shallow pan, skin side up. Sprinkle with salt.
3. Broil until browned.
4. Stir the sauce and pour over the chicken.
5. Bake at 350°F for about 25 minutes, depending on thickness of chicken.
6. Arrange pineapple and thin lemon slices around chicken, basting with the sauce in the pan.
7. Continue baking for 5 minutes longer.
8. Serve over rice.
